The '''Battle of Orron III''' took place early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], near the completion of the battlestation [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]].<ref name="X-wing" />

When the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Rescue of enslaved Wookiees|captured]] the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] slave [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Toral (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Toral'']], they learned from documents found in its memory that it had been scheduled to link up with a weapons convoy assembling near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orron III]]. The freighters ''[[The Tone]]'' and ''[[Uhuru]]'' had already assembled, along with the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvette]] group ''[[Hyko]]'', and were preparing to leave for the Death Star I, when the Rebel force showed up. All ships were subsequently destroyed by [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] and [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]] and [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]].<ref name="X-wing" />

[[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], flying a Y-wing in Red Squadron as [[Red Two/Legends|Red Two]], made a mistake which resulted in the loss of two wingmen, and his briefing officer [[Lagrane|Commander Lagrane]] suspended him from operations pending an official inquest regarding the incident. He was eventually returned to active duty with a warning and a compulsory visit to the flight simulators for some brushing up.<ref name="XWOSG" />
